overview.headline: Add loyalty points accrual and burn to checkout, with integer points from subtotal cents and burn applied after percent discount.
overview.body:
## What this PR does
Introduces a loyalty points system for the checkout flow. A new `loyalty.ts` module provides `pointsForSubtotal` (accrues integer points from subtotal cents, 1 point per whole dollar) and `centsFromPoints` (converts points to cents at 1:1). The `pricing.ts` module gains `applyLoyaltyBurn`, which subtracts a point-based discount from the subtotal **after** the percent discount has been applied. The CI workflow is also updated to point at a development branch of Code Beat and to configure review models, retry logic, and report settings.

## Big picture
This is the first piece of a loyalty program. Points are earned on the subtotal (whole dollars only) and can be burned as a fixed cent discount. The order of operations is deliberate: percent discounts are applied first, then loyalty burn, so that percentage deals never reduce the value of points. The architecture keeps loyalty logic separate from core pricing, with a clean import in `pricing.ts`.

## Major decisions
- **Integer points only** – points are integers (no floats) to avoid rounding drift; fractional cents do not earn points.
- **1 point = 1 cent burn** – simple fixed rate; no tiered burn rates yet.
- **Burn after percent discount** – ensures percent promotions don't diminish point value.
- **Points from whole dollars only** – `Math.floor(subtotalCents / 100)`; fractional cents are ignored.
- **CI workflow points at development branch** – uses `code-beat@improve-pr-overview-report` to test the new overview report feature.

## Scope
- **In scope**: loyalty points accrual, point-to-cents conversion, loyalty burn in pricing, CI workflow configuration for testing.
- **Out of scope**: point redemption UI, tiered loyalty tiers, point expiration, integration with user accounts, or any persistence.
majorDecisions: Integer points only (no floats) to avoid rounding drift.
1 point = 1 cent burn rate for simplicity; no tiered rates yet.
Burn applied after percent discount so percentage deals don't reduce point value.
Points earned only from whole dollars (fractional cents ignored).
CI workflow points at a development branch to test the new overview report feature.

review.summary: Code Beat did not find clear actionable issues in this pull request.
